name: Robert Scoble
bio: Tech evangelist, author. Founder of Unaligned. Ex-Microsoft. Silicon Valley AI & spatial computing 전문가.

opinions.text: The New AI Infrastructure Economy — AI infrastructure is shifting to chips, cloud and data centers. The investment landscape for AI is evolving rapidly as companies race to build the computational backbone needed for next-generation AI systems.

NVIDIA Investor Report Analysis — Robert Scoble shares insights from meetings with NVIDIA, analyzing the company's position in the AI infrastructure market and the implications for investors in the rapidly evolving AI chip landscape.

THE ULTIMATE CLAWDBOT REPORT — Every single important post on X about ClawdBot. ClawdBot is taking the world by storm. Report and analysis covering the very hot trend of AI agents that can autonomously interact and create.

GTC 2026 Highlights — Robert Scoble discusses the latest developments in AI, robotics, and spatial computing at NVIDIA's GPU Technology Conference, covering breakthrough announcements in physical AI and autonomous systems.
